title: Senior Software Engineer - Saksoft - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Saksoft - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Saksoft. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About Saksoft:
Saksoft is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Saksoft!
